title: croton compressus
intro: Croton compressus, also known as Croton lechleri or Dragon's Blood, is a plant native to the Amazon rainforest with a rich history of traditional use. The plant has been employed in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, cuts, and burns. Its medicinal properties also extend to relieving digestive issues, such as diarrhea and ulcers, and have been used to treat fever and respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Croton compressus include extracts and tinctures, which can be applied topically or taken internally to promote healing and alleviate symptoms.
